overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 featuring a character in a red jacket spray-painting graffiti under a concrete overpass, then proceeding down a tree-lined pedestrian walkway with futuristic lighting fixtures and scattered makeshift camps.

events.description: character begins spray-painting the word 'SNITCH' on the concrete wall
character stops painting and turns to walk away from the wall toward the path

agents.ego_description: spray-painting graffiti on the wall while moving along its surface and shaking the paint can

entered.detail: concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti tags including 'NO FUTURE' in teal
cluster of blue garbage bags piled against the wall
wooden pallets, cardboard, and trash scattered on the ground
massive concrete highway overpass structure overhead
dense green trees and bushes visible beyond the overpass edge

segments.scene_description: Under a concrete highway overpass, the player character spray-paints graffiti on a wall covered in tags and surrounded by trash bags and debris. The camera circles around the character as they paint, with dappled morning light filtering through the trees beyond the overpass structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined pedestrian walkway under elevated highway

events.description: exits the graffiti area and enters the tree-lined pedestrian path with futuristic lighting
camera passes a pedestrian walking in the opposite direction on the path

agents.ego_description: walking down the pedestrian path away from the graffiti location, passing through the tree-lined corridor

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking away from camera down the center of the path
person sitting on the ground near a makeshift camp beside the path

entered.detail: tall vertical light fixtures with glowing white bars lining both sides of the path
wide concrete walkway stretching into the distance under the overpass
wooden benches placed along the left side of the walkway
encampment with people sitting and belongings gathered under the overpass

segments.scene_description: The character walks away from the graffiti wall down a tree-lined pedestrian path beneath the overpass, illuminated by futuristic vertical light poles. The camera follows through this narrow green corridor, passing a makeshift camp on the left and other pedestrians walking along the path, with modern buildings visible in the distance through the tree canopy.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a gritty, secluded urban nook into a structured pedestrian corridor. It begins under a concrete highway overpass, circling a character in a red jacket as they spray-paint graffiti onto a wall cluttered with tags and debris. As the character finishes and begins to walk away, the camera follows them forward, shifting from the shadowed overpass into a narrow green corridor lined with trees. The scene then expands along a pedestrian path illuminated by futuristic vertical light poles, passing a makeshift camp and other pedestrians. Finally, the view opens up to reveal modern buildings visible through the canopy in the distance.
